name: io.github.BoraGkc/ghost-publisher
description: Write with your AI and publish safely to Ghost.

environmentVariables.name: GHOST_ADMIN_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Admin API key from a Ghost custom integration.

environmentVariables.name: GHOST_API_VERSION
environmentVariables.description: Ghost Admin API compatibility version; defaults to v5.0.

environmentVariables.name: GHOST_READ_ONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to true to expose only read-only tools; defaults to false.

environmentVariables.name: GHOST_UPLOAD_ROOTS
environmentVariables.description: Allowed absolute directories for local image uploads.

environmentVariables.name: GHOST_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional deployment hook called once after a completely successful publish or unpublish batch.

environmentVariables.name: GHOST_PUBLIC_POST_URL_TEMPLATE
environmentVariables.description: Optional public post URL containing {slug} for live checks.

environmentVariables.name: GHOST_PUBLIC_PAGE_URL_TEMPLATE
environmentVariables.description: Optional public page URL containing {slug} for headless live checks.
